creator: will.brokenbourgh2877@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 175475
Image of conversation window, showing buddy icon doubling

When a conversation window is open in Pidgin and a custom icon has been selected for the buddy, the buddy icon is doubled vertically (see attachment).

This does not appear to be a problem on Debian Linux or OpenBSD with the same Pidgin version (2.11.0).
